synthesis.driver: Global supply glut is capping war premium from contested Hormuz, keeping Brent flat.
synthesis.based_on: The Tanker Tycoon Making Millions on Hormuz Shuttle Runs

takes.the tanker tycoon making millions on hor: Increased tanker activity signals stable flows, limiting upward price pressure.
takes.new middle east corridors are about more: New corridors reduce Hormuz reliance, weakening the war premium slightly.
takes.iran war live khamenei s funeral march b: Iran tensions sustain a small risk premium but fail to lift prices.
takes.cargo ship reportedly attacked in red se: Red Sea attack adds minor bullish sentiment, but glut keeps prices subdued.
